---
title: "Tutorials"
description: "Worked examples using the EpiAware packages together."
---

Tutorials that use the packages together — building a small joint model from
composable parts — are on the way. They are not ready yet; we would rather
publish a few good end-to-end examples than a long list of stubs.

In the meantime:

- Each package's own documentation includes worked examples. Browse them in the
  [documentation viewer](docs.qmd) — [CensoredDistributions.jl](docs.html?pkg=CensoredDistributions.jl)
  has the most complete set, including fitting delay distributions with
  [Turing.jl](https://turinglang.org).
- The [Bayesian Workflow](https://avehtari.github.io/Bayesian-Workflow/) book and
  [a workflow for infectious disease modelling](https://github.com/seabbs/a-workflow-for-infectious-disease-modelling)
  give the modelling approach these tools are designed to support.

Have a tutorial you'd like to see, or one you'd like to write? Suggest it on the
[forum](https://community.epinowcast.org/) or see [Contributing](contributing.qmd).
